body.title: Normalize closed_tickets.txt path (~/.TheIgors/lab/claudecode/ → ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/)
body.result: Normalized: cc_queue.py + github_sync.py both use ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/closed_tickets.txt. Merged 506+165→660 deduped lines (sort-desc, newest first). ~/.TheIgors/lab/{claudecode,} dirs removed. Commit: see latest.
body.description:
Reorg § 4 #11 — only file in ~/.TheIgors/lab/claudecode/ is closed_tickets.txt (written by cc_queue.py:57 + github_sync.py:223). All other CC runtime artifacts live at ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/ (no lab/). Consolidate the path.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py:57, lab/claudecode/github_sync.py:223, ~/.TheIgors/lab/claudecode/closed_tickets.txt (mv to ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/closed_tickets.txt)
**Design rules:** path-consolidation
**Scope boundary:** in — change two path constants; mv existing file; verify no other code references the old path; rmdir ~/.TheIgors/lab/claudecode/ when empty; out — closed-tickets schema/format changes
**Test plan:** grep confirms only 2 referrers; after change cc_queue.py done <id> appends to new path; existing closed-tickets log preserved (no data loss)
